message:
feat(auth): add VCR-testable OAuth refresh + RPC session lock fixes

OAuth Refresh Testability (src/auth.rs):
- Extract refresh_expired_oauth_tokens_with_client() method that accepts
  a custom HTTP client, enabling VCR playback in tests
- Original refresh_expired_oauth_tokens() now delegates to the new method
  with a default Client::new()
- Update refresh_anthropic_oauth_token() to accept client parameter

RPC Session Lock Updates (src/rpc.rs):
- AgentSession.session is now Arc<Mutex<Session>> per SessionHandle refactor
- Add inner session lock acquisition for:
  - get_session_stats: lock guard.session before calling session_stats()
  - get_conversation: lock guard.session for entries_for_current_path()
  - set_thinking_level: lock guard.session for current_model_entry()
- Use descriptive error messages for lock failures

OAuth Refresh VCR Tests (tests/auth_oauth_refresh_vcr.rs):
- New test file for OAuth token refresh scenarios using VCR playback
- Helper functions for cassette loading, JSON redaction, artifact recording
- Implements bd-3pn test coverage for auth refresh flows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
